message:
fix: log warning on invalid override files, return ReadDir errors (gt-dhp3u)

LoadAllOverrides now:
- Logs a warning to stderr when an override file has invalid JSON instead of
  silently skipping it. This prevents security-critical overrides from failing
  without any indication.
- Returns an error for ReadDir failures other than ErrNotExist, instead of
  swallowing all errors. Only a missing overrides directory is treated as OK.
